---
title: ""
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: "{en,cn}/**/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description]
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 3
  - id: posts-en
    contents: posts/en/**/*/index.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description]
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
  - id: posts-cn
    contents: posts/cn/**/*/index.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description]
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
  - id: r
    contents: r/**/*/index.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description]
    categories: cloud
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 3
date-format: iso
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: true
back-to-top-navigation: false
---

## 中文

::: {#posts-cn}
:::

<a href="../posts/cn/index.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary float-end">所有</button></a>

## English

::: {#posts-en}
:::

<a href="../posts/en/index.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary float-end">See all</button></a>

## 所有 \| All

::: {#posts}
:::
